welcome.title: Welcome to BCTI
welcome.p1: is a professional company that provides a wide range of commercial equipment for the food and beverage (F&B) industry, as well as franchise business solutions across Indonesia. We offer a variety of high-quality machines, including ice cream machines, coffee machines, ice makers, fructose machines, and supporting equipment such as blenders, cup sealers, display showcases, refrigerators, and intelligent milk tea machines, all designed to support efficient and modern business operations.
welcome.p2: With a strong commitment to innovation and operational excellence, we offer integrated services ranging from the supply of ice cream machines and smart commercial equipment to complete business solutions (One-Stop Business Solutions), including after-sales service and professional technical support to ensure every machine operates optimally and sustainably.
welcome.p3: Our goal is to help franchise businesses grow with efficient, scalable, and sustainable systems in the Indonesian market.

items.title: Advanced Technology
items.desc: Modern ice cream machines with high performance.

items.title: Professional Service
items.desc: Experienced technicians ensuring optimal machine performance.

items.title: Competitive Pricing
items.desc: Investment aligned with premium quality and performance.

inf.text: Have questions about ice cream machines, ice makers, gelato machines, coffee machines, or other refrigeration equipment? Our team is ready to help you find the best solution. Contact our customer service today!

footer.tagline: Supporting your business success with reliable machines and ingredients.
footer.motto: Your trusted partner in building a successful business.

about.description1: BCTI | Bestone Cold Technology Indonesia is a professional company that provides commercial ice cream machines and F&B franchise business solutions across Indonesia. We deliver high-quality soft ice cream machines designed to support efficient food and beverage business operations.
about.description2: With a strong commitment to innovation and operational excellence, we offer integrated services ranging from the supply of ice cream machines and smart commercial equipment to complete business solutions (One-Stop Business Solutions), including after-sales service and professional technical support to ensure every machine operates optimally and sustainably.
about.description3: Our goal is to help franchise businesses grow with efficient, scalable, and sustainable systems in the Indonesian market.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become a trusted and leading business partner in Indonesia in providing machinery and integrated business solutions, prioritizing product quality, excellent service, and competitive pricing to support sustainable business growth for our customers.

mission.title: Our Mission
items: Deliver high-quality machinery products backed by more than 28 years of manufacturing experience, along with professional, fast, and reliable after-sales service.
Provide integrated solutions including machinery, raw materials, and technical support, enabling customers to focus on business growth without operational obstacles.
Manufacture machines independently to ensure competitive and flexible pricing tailored to customers' business needs and scale.
Expand distribution and services across Indonesia to ensure every customer has access to the best products and services without geographical limitations.
